name: Basic Hamburgers
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Dill Pickle, chopped or 1/4 cup Pickle Relish
recipeInstructions: Mix all ingredients together. Shape mixture into 6 patties, each about 3/4-inch thick. Broil or grill patties 4-inches from the heat, turning once, to desired doneness, 10 to 15 minutes. Serve on toasted buns with favorite toppings.
